베드로후서 3:1.content: This is now, beloved, the second letter that I have written to you; and in both of them I stir up your sincere mind by reminding you,

베드로후서 3:2.content: that you should remember the words which were spoken before by the holy prophets, and the commandment of us, the apostles of the Lord and Savior:

베드로후서 3:3.content: knowing this first, that in the last days mockers will come, walking after their own lusts

베드로후서 3:4.content: and saying, “Where is the promise of his coming? For, from the day that the fathers fell asleep, all things continue as they were from the beginning of the creation.”

베드로후서 3:5.content: For this they willfully forget that there were heavens from of old, and an earth formed out of water and amid water by the word of God,

베드로후서 3:6.content: by which means the world that existed then, being overflowed with water, perished.

베드로후서 3:7.content: But the heavens that exist now and the earth, by the same word have been stored up for fire, being reserved against the day of judgment and destruction of ungodly men.

베드로후서 3:8.content: But don’t forget this one thing, beloved, that one day is with the Lord as a thousand years, and a thousand years as one day.

베드로후서 3:9.content: The Lord is not slow concerning his promise, as some count slowness; but he is patient with us, not wishing that anyone should perish, but that all should come to repentance.

베드로후서 3:10.content: But the day of the Lord will come as a thief in the night; in which the heavens will pass away with a great noise, and the elements will be dissolved with fervent heat, and the earth and the works that are in it will be burned up.

베드로후서 3:11.content: Therefore since all these things will be destroyed like this, what kind of people ought you to be in holy living and godliness,

베드로후서 3:12.content: looking for and earnestly desiring the coming of the day of God, which will cause the burning heavens to be dissolved, and the elements will melt with fervent heat?

베드로후서 3:13.content: But, according to his promise, we look for new heavens and a new earth, in which righteousness dwells.

베드로후서 3:14.content: Therefore, beloved, seeing that you look for these things, be diligent to be found in peace, without defect and blameless in his sight.

베드로후서 3:15.content: Regard the patience of our Lord as salvation; even as our beloved brother Paul also, according to the wisdom given to him, wrote to you,

베드로후서 3:16.content: as also in all of his letters, speaking in them of these things. In those, there are some things that are hard to understand, which the ignorant and unsettled twist, as they also do to the other Scriptures, to their own destruction.

베드로후서 3:17.content: You therefore, beloved, knowing these things beforehand, beware, lest being carried away with the error of the wicked, you fall from your own steadfastness.

베드로후서 3:18.content: But grow in the grace and knowledge of our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ. To him be the glory both now and forever. Amen.
